request_scope: Full data export - all personal data held
notes: Standard request; data compiled from 3 systems. Delivered via encrypted ZIP.

request_scope: Delete all account data and analytics history
notes: Account closed. Data erased from primary systems. Backup erasure scheduled per 90-day policy.

request_scope: Copy of all marketing consent records
notes: Narrow scope - only consent records from HubSpot. Quick turnaround.

request_scope: Correct company name and job title in account profile
notes: Simple correction. Updated in PostgreSQL and Salesforce.

request_scope: Export all data in machine-readable format
notes: Required custom JSON export from 4 systems. Delivered on time.

request_scope: Delete all personal data including backups
notes: Erasure across all primary systems. Backup erasure per 90-day schedule. Notified of backup timeline.

request_scope: Full data export including all processing logs and third-party sharing records
notes: Complex request spanning 7 integrated systems. Extension filed under Art. 12(3). Data subject notified Sept 23. Response delivered 25 days before extended deadline.

request_scope: Copy of all personal data and processing purposes
Restrict processing pending accuracy dispute on usage data
notes: Processing restricted on disputed records. Customer flagged in system.

request_scope: Full data export including all third-party transfers and data sharing audit trail
notes: Complex request involving third-party transfer documentation. Pending legal review of scope — legal counsel reviewing whether internal audit trails constitute "personal data" under Art. 15. No extension filed. No communication sent to data subject regarding delay.

request_scope: Delete account and all associated data
notes: Standard erasure. Account closed and data removed from primary systems.

request_scope: Copy of consent records and marketing communication history
notes: Narrow scope. Consent records from OneTrust and email history from SendGrid.

request_scope: Machine-readable export of all account and usage data
notes: Standard portability request. JSON export from PostgreSQL and Amplitude.
